task_completion.description: Navigate to the Create Webmin User form.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screen showing the 'Create Webmin User' form in the Webmin web interface.

task_completion.description: Enter the username 'dns_auditor' and the required password.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The username field contains 'dns_auditor' and the password field is filled (either visible as 'AuditorAccess2024!' or masked with dots).

task_completion.description: Assign only the 'BIND DNS Server' module to the user.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Available Webmin modules' section, the checkbox for 'BIND DNS Server' is selected. No other modules should be selected.

task_completion.description: Open the Module Access Control page for the BIND DNS Server module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screen showing the 'Module Access Control' or 'ACL' settings specifically for the 'BIND DNS Server' module and the user 'dns_auditor'.

task_completion.description: Set the BIND DNS Server module permissions to read-only, disabling configuration and server control.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Options restricting access are selected in the ACL page, such as 'Read-only access mode' set to Yes, 'Can edit module configuration' set to No, and 'Can stop, start and apply' set to No.

integrity.description: The agent used the Webmin GUI to create the user and configure ACLs.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Webmin web interface in a browser, rather than terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Webmin application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser shows the Webmin interface with its typical layout, menus, and forms, not a mock-up or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the GUI by editing Webmin configuration files directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no screenshots showing terminal-based text editors (like nano or vim) editing files in `/etc/webmin/`.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target user must be 'dns_auditor' with the password 'AuditorAccess2024!'. The user must be assigned ONLY the 'BIND DNS Server' (bind8) module. The ACL for this module must be configured with read-only access (readonly=1), no module configuration access (noconfig=1), and no ability to start/stop the server (stop=0).
